deploy.startCommand: sh -lc 'PORT_VALUE=$(printf "%s" "$PORT" | tr -cd "0-9"); [ -n "$PORT_VALUE" ] || PORT_VALUE=8080; php artisan optimize:clear || true; php artisan migrate --force; php artisan db:seed --class=UserSeeder --force || true; php artisan up || true; php -S 0.0.0.0:$PORT_VALUE -t public public/index.php'
